title: System ⚙️
envMissing: env file does not exist. Click "Edit" or run in your terminal:
envWarn: ⚠ File contains plaintext credentials. 0600 permissions preserved on save.
envEtagBody: Click cancel and reopen the editor.
upgradeBody: Current {{current}} → {{latest}}. All pipelines must be stopped. Restart sps console after upgrade.
upgradeDoneBody: Installed v{{version}}. Run `pkill -f "sps console"` and restart to apply.
upgradeIneffectiveSameVersion: npm finished but the version did not change (still {{version}}) — likely permissions or registry issue. Copy the command below to run manually.
upgradeIneffectiveNoInstall: npm did not install a new version. Copy the command to run manually, or check the log below.
cmdCopiedBody:
Paste it into your terminal to run:
{{cmd}}

doctor.title: Project health check
doctor.fixHint: Runs sps doctor <proj> --fix: auto-creates .claude/hooks/stop.sh, state.json, etc.
